title: 10 best herbal teas for queasy stomach
description: Crataegus monogyna, also known as hawthorn, teas helps with queasy stomach because of its natural anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The flavonoids and oligomeric proanthocyanidins present in hawthorn tea have been shown to improve digestion, reduce inflammation, and soothe the stomach muscles, thereby alleviating nausea and discomfort.
